runtime_artifacts.name: dashboard_artifact
runtime_artifacts.validation: Strict deployment validation requires 20 strategies, non-empty literature results, and chart series; runtime bootstrap only requires safe non-live schema fields.

runtime_artifacts.name: live_overlay
runtime_artifacts.validation: May be rebuilt from the dashboard artifact; missing cache must not block startup.

runtime_artifacts.name: intraday_refresh_status
runtime_artifacts.validation: Status file is operational telemetry only; missing status means no refresh has run yet.

generated_research_artifacts.name: strategy_factory_research
generated_research_artifacts.validation: Generated research evidence; tests must skip or run the generator when absent.

generated_research_artifacts.name: research_selection_packs
generated_research_artifacts.source_generator: python scripts/run_final_strategy_research.py and related research scripts
generated_research_artifacts.validation: Generated research evidence; never synthesize market/performance rows for tests.

generated_research_artifacts.name: shadow_live_outputs
generated_research_artifacts.validation: Generated paper/shadow operational evidence; missing output is an explicit fixture prerequisite.

rules.fresh_deployment: Runtime must start without ignored output files.
rules.bootstrap_data: Bootstrap artifacts may use committed canonical operational seed only.
rules.market_data: Do not fabricate market, performance, brokerage, or live fill data.
rules.strict_validation: Generated research/paper artifacts must be produced by their source generators before strict evidence tests run.
rules.brokerage: Live brokerage fills remain disabled and are not represented.
